tools.ocrPdf.infoText.en: OCR (Optical Character Recognition) extracts text from scanned documents and images. For best results, use high-quality scans and select the correct language(s).
tools.ocrPdf.infoText.zh: OCR（光学字符识别）从扫描文档和图像中提取文本。为获得最佳效果，请使用高质量扫描件并选择正确的语言。

tools.linearizePdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop PDF files here, or click to browse. You can select multiple files.
tools.linearizePdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处，或点击浏览。可以选择多个文件。

tools.linearizePdf.info.en: Linearization optimizes PDFs for fast web viewing. The first page will display before the entire file is downloaded, improving user experience for web-hosted documents.
tools.linearizePdf.info.zh: 线性化优化PDF以实现快速网页浏览。第一页会在整个文件下载完成前显示，改善网页托管文档的用户体验。

tools.linearizePdf.useObjectStreams.en: Use object streams for better compression
tools.linearizePdf.useObjectStreams.zh: 使用对象流以获得更好的压缩

tools.linearizePdf.useObjectStreamsDesc.en: Recommended for smaller file sizes. Disable for maximum compatibility with older PDF readers.
tools.linearizePdf.useObjectStreamsDesc.zh: 推荐使用以获得更小的文件大小。如需与旧版PDF阅读器兼容，请禁用此选项。

tools.pageDimensions.showingFirst50.en: Showing first 50 pages. Download JSON for complete data.
tools.pageDimensions.showingFirst50.zh: 显示前50页。下载JSON获取完整数据。

tools.removeRestrictions.uploadDescripti.en: Drag and drop a restricted PDF file.
tools.removeRestrictions.uploadDescripti.zh: 拖放受限制的PDF文件到此处。

tools.removeRestrictions.ownerPasswordPl.zh: 如果知道所有者密码请输入

tools.removeRestrictions.ownerPasswordHi.en: If the PDF has an owner password, enter it here for better results.
tools.removeRestrictions.ownerPasswordHi.zh: 如果PDF有所有者密码，在此输入可获得更好的结果。

tools.removeRestrictions.info.en: This tool removes owner password restrictions that prevent printing, copying, and editing. It works on PDFs with permission restrictions but cannot remove user passwords required to open the document.
tools.removeRestrictions.info.zh: 此工具可移除阻止打印、复制和编辑的所有者密码限制。它适用于有权限限制的PDF，但无法移除打开文档所需的用户密码。

tools.removeRestrictions.warning.en: Only use this tool on PDFs you own or have permission to modify. Removing restrictions from copyrighted material without authorization may violate copyright laws.
tools.removeRestrictions.warning.zh: 请仅对您拥有或有权修改的PDF使用此工具。未经授权移除受版权保护材料的限制可能违反版权法。

tools.removeRestrictions.successHint.en: The PDF can now be printed, copied, and edited without restrictions.
tools.removeRestrictions.successHint.zh: PDF现在可以无限制地打印、复制和编辑。

tools.removeRestrictions.invalidPassword.en: The password you entered is incorrect. Please check and try again.
tools.removeRestrictions.invalidPassword.zh: 您输入的密码不正确，请检查后重试。

tools.sanitizePdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to sanitize.
tools.sanitizePdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行清理。

tools.sanitizePdf.info.en: Sanitization removes potentially harmful content from PDFs, making them safer to open and share.
tools.sanitizePdf.info.zh: 清理功能会移除PDF中潜在的有害内容，使其更安全地打开和分享。

tools.flattenPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to flatten.
tools.flattenPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行扁平化。

tools.removeMetadata.info.en: Removing metadata helps protect your privacy by stripping identifying information from the PDF.
tools.removeMetadata.info.zh: 移除元数据有助于保护您的隐私，从PDF中删除识别信息。

tools.changePermissions.privacyNotice.en: 🔒 Your passwords are processed locally and never sent to any server.
tools.changePermissions.privacyNotice.zh: 🔒 您的密码在本地处理，永远不会发送到任何服务器。

tools.changePermissions.currentPasswordH.en: Required if the PDF is already password-protected.
tools.changePermissions.currentPasswordH.zh: 如果PDF已受密码保护，则需要输入。

tools.changePermissions.newUserPasswordH.en: Users will need this password to open the PDF.
tools.changePermissions.newUserPasswordH.zh: 用户需要此密码才能打开PDF。

tools.changePermissions.newOwnerPassword.zh: 新所有者密码（更改权限）
需要此密码才能执行权限限制。

tools.changePermissions.info.en: Note: Permission enforcement requires PDF encryption. Set an owner password below to enforce restrictions.
tools.changePermissions.info.zh: 注意：权限执行需要PDF加密。请在下方设置所有者密码以执行限制。

tools.changePermissions.allowHighQuality.en: Users can print at high resolution
tools.changePermissions.allowHighQuality.zh: 用户可以高分辨率打印

tools.changePermissions.allowCopyingDesc.en: Users can copy text and images
tools.changePermissions.allowCopyingDesc.zh: 用户可以复制文本和图像

tools.changePermissions.allowAnnotatingD.en: Users can add comments and annotations
tools.changePermissions.allowAnnotatingD.zh: 用户可以添加评论和注释

tools.changePermissions.allowFillingForm.en: Users can fill in form fields
tools.changePermissions.allowFillingForm.zh: 用户可以填写表单字段

tools.changePermissions.allowAccessibili.zh: 屏幕阅读器可以访问内容

tools.changePermissions.allowAssemblyDes.en: Users can insert, delete, or rotate pages
tools.changePermissions.allowAssemblyDes.zh: 用户可以插入、删除或旋转页面

tools.changePermissions.successHint.en: For full permission enforcement, encrypt the PDF with an owner password.
tools.changePermissions.successHint.zh: 如需完全执行权限，请使用所有者密码加密PDF。

tools.changePermissions.invalidPassword.en: The current password you entered is incorrect. Please check and try again.
tools.changePermissions.invalidPassword.zh: 您输入的当前密码不正确，请检查后重试。

tools.changePermissions.passwordRequired.en: This PDF is password-protected. Please enter the current password to proceed.
tools.changePermissions.passwordRequired.zh: 此PDF受密码保护，请输入当前密码以继续。

tools.fixPageSize.scaleFitDesc.en: Scale content to fit within page, maintaining aspect ratio
tools.fixPageSize.scaleFitDesc.zh: 缩放内容以适应页面，保持纵横比

tools.fixPageSize.scaleFillDesc.en: Scale content to fill page, may crop edges
tools.fixPageSize.scaleFillDesc.zh: 缩放内容以填充页面，可能裁剪边缘

tools.fixPageSize.scaleStretchDesc.en: Stretch content to fill page exactly
tools.fixPageSize.scaleStretchDesc.zh: 拉伸内容以完全填充页面

tools.watermark.enterText.en: Please enter text for the watermark.

tools.watermark.selectImage.en: Please select an image file for the watermark.

tools.watermark.unsupportedImage.en: Unsupported image format. Please use PNG or JPG.
tools.watermark.unsupportedImage.zh: 不支持的图片格式，请使用 PNG 或 JPG。

tools.headerFooter.previewHint.en: Enter header or footer text to see preview
tools.headerFooter.previewHint.zh: 输入页眉或页脚文本以查看预览

tools.textColor.thresholdHint.en: Adjust to control which pixels are affected
tools.textColor.thresholdHint.zh: 调整以控制哪些像素会被改变

tools.stamps.instruction1.en: Click the Stamp tool (image icon) in the toolbar above
tools.stamps.instruction1.zh: 点击上方工具栏中的印章工具（图片图标）

tools.stamps.instruction2.en: Click "Add image" to upload your stamp image
tools.stamps.instruction2.zh: 点击「添加图片」上传您的印章图片

tools.stamps.instruction3.en: Click on the PDF where you want to place the stamp
tools.stamps.instruction3.zh: 点击PDF中要放置印章的位置

tools.stamps.instruction4.en: Drag to resize or reposition the stamp
tools.stamps.instruction4.zh: 拖动以调整大小或重新定位印章

tools.stamps.instruction5.en: Click "Save Stamped PDF" below when done
tools.stamps.instruction5.zh: 完成后点击下方的「保存印章PDF」

tools.stamps.viewerNotReady.en: Viewer not ready. Please wait for the PDF to load.
tools.stamps.viewerNotReady.zh: 查看器未就绪，请等待PDF加载完成。

tools.stamps.saveFailed.en: Failed to save stamped PDF. Please try again.

tools.formFiller.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF form.

tools.removeBlankPages.analyzingPages.en: Reading pages and computing information entropy...
tools.removeBlankPages.analyzingPages.zh: 正在读取页面并计算信息熵...

tools.removeBlankPages.sensitivityHint.en: Higher sensitivity is more lenient, making pages with slight scanning noise/watermarks easily marked as blank. Recommended blank pages are greyed out with a red diagonal bar. Click cards directly to override: force keep or force delete.
tools.removeBlankPages.sensitivityHint.zh: 值越高判定条件越宽松，即使带有少许墨迹或噪点的页面也会被当成空白页删除。系统推荐删除的页面会显示为置灰和红圈禁止符。你可以直接点击卡片来强行保留或删除某页。

tools.tableOfContents.bookmarkRequired.en: This tool generates a clickable table of contents from existing PDF bookmarks. Please ensure your PDF has bookmarks before using this tool. You can add bookmarks using the Edit Bookmarks tool.
tools.tableOfContents.bookmarkRequired.zh: 此工具从现有PDF书签生成可点击的目录。请确保您的PDF已有书签。您可以使用「编辑书签」工具添加书签。

tools.bookletFoldingSimulator.uploadDesc.en: Drag and drop a PDF file here for 3D folding simulation.
tools.bookletFoldingSimulator.uploadDesc.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行3D折页模拟。

tools.pdfToSlide.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF here to extract outline and charts for slide reconstruction.
tools.pdfToSlide.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处，提取大纲与图表重建幻灯片。

tools.pdfToSlide.successMessage.en: Slide reconstruction successful! Click to download PPTX file.
tools.pdfToSlide.successMessage.zh: 幻灯片重建成功！点击下载PPTX文件。

tools.pdfToSlide.outlineExtracting.en: Analyzing document structure and extracting outlines...
tools.pdfToSlide.outlineExtracting.zh: 正在分析文档层级并提炼大纲...

tools.pdfToSlide.chartExtracting.en: Scanning and isolating vector charts and tables as images...
tools.pdfToSlide.chartExtracting.zh: 正在扫描分割矢量图表与表格并保存为独立图像...

tools.einkOptimizer.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop your PDF e-book here to optimize for e-Ink paper contrast.
tools.einkOptimizer.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF电子书到此处，进行墨水屏护眼黑白对比优化。

tools.einkOptimizer.successMessage.en: e-Ink PDF optimization complete! File size successfully shrunk.
tools.einkOptimizer.successMessage.zh: 护眼墨水屏PDF优化完成！文件已成功瘦身。

tools.certCryptor.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop your PDF here to apply a 3D wax seal and certificate lock.
tools.certCryptor.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处以放置3D火漆印章及证书锁。

tools.certCryptor.optionsTitle.zh: 物理签名与证书加密选项

tools.certCryptor.successMessage.en: 3D wax-seal imprint and certificate-based encryption applied successfully!
tools.certCryptor.successMessage.zh: 3D火漆签名与双钥证书加密已成功执行！

tools.passportIdComposer.uploadDescripti.en: Drag & drop both front and back sides of passport/ID cards to compose A4 copy.
tools.passportIdComposer.uploadDescripti.zh: 拖放身份证/护照正面与反面到此处进行拼大版。

tools.passportIdComposer.successMessage.zh: 国标证件双面拼版成功！

tools.annotationExporter.uploadDescripti.en: Drag & drop PDF here to extract highlights, comments, and outline notebook.
tools.annotationExporter.uploadDescripti.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处以提取所有高亮及笔记大纲。

tools.batchWatermarkRemover.uploadDescri.en: Drag & drop PDF here to physically purge background watermarks.
tools.batchWatermarkRemover.uploadDescri.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处以一键物理清除水印。

tools.batchWatermarkRemover.successMessa.zh: 水印物理擦除净化完成！

tools.smartDataRedactor.uploadDescriptio.en: Drag & drop PDF here to automatically scan & redact privacy data.
tools.smartDataRedactor.uploadDescriptio.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行隐私脱敏。

tools.smartDataRedactor.processButton.zh: 自动扫描并脱敏敏感词

tools.bookmarksAutoGenerator.uploadDescr.en: Drag & drop PDF here to auto generate bookmarks from structure.
tools.bookmarksAutoGenerator.uploadDescr.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处推导自动生成书签大纲。

tools.bookmarksAutoGenerator.processButt.zh: 一键推导并注入大纲书签

tools.bookmarksAutoGenerator.successMess.en: Bookmarks successfully injected into PDF Outline structure!
tools.bookmarksAutoGenerator.successMess.zh: PDF多级书签物理注入成功！

tools.batchBarcodeInjector.uploadDescrip.en: Drag & drop PDF here to batch stamp QR / Barcodes.
tools.batchBarcodeInjector.uploadDescrip.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处以批量对齐注入二维码/条码。

tools.batchBarcodeInjector.optionsTitle.zh: 资产条码批量注入选项

tools.batchBarcodeInjector.successMessag.zh: 资产条码/二维码批量注入成功！

tools.signatureInkOptimizer.uploadDescri.en: Drag & drop signature photos to extract transparent PNG ink layer.
tools.signatureInkOptimizer.uploadDescri.zh: 拖放手写字迹或印泥照片进行Alpha去底噪净化。

tools.signatureInkOptimizer.processButto.zh: 提取纯净透明手写签章

tools.signatureInkOptimizer.successMessa.zh: 手写签名/盖章背景去噪净化成功！

tools.deadLinkDebugger.uploadDescription.en: Drag & drop PDF here to probe interactive hyperlinks.
tools.deadLinkDebugger.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行超链接探测。

tools.deadLinkDebugger.optionsTitle.zh: 超链接探测与重定向选项

tools.deadLinkDebugger.successMessage.zh: 超链接探测与修复成功！

tools.interactiveTocGenerator.uploadDesc.en: Drag & drop PDF here to auto compile interactive Table of Contents.
tools.interactiveTocGenerator.uploadDesc.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处一键自动添加互动目录。

tools.interactiveTocGenerator.successMes.en: Interactive TOC page & bidirectional anchors woven successfully!
tools.interactiveTocGenerator.successMes.zh: 前置互动目录页及双向跳转锚点注入成功！

tools.globalInvoiceParser.uploadDescript.en: Drag & drop invoice PDF here to automatically apply exchange ledger.
tools.globalInvoiceParser.uploadDescript.zh: 拖放PDF账单到此处进行汇率折算与账本盖印。

tools.globalInvoiceParser.optionsTitle.zh: 全球发票折算汇率选项

tools.globalInvoiceParser.successMessage.en: Foreign invoice translated and local conversion ledger stamped successfully!
tools.globalInvoiceParser.successMessage.zh: 外币发票翻译与本地折算账本印盖成功！

tools.watermark.previewNote.en: Showing first page only for better performance
tools.watermark.previewNote.zh: 仅展示首页预览以优化性能

faqPage.subtitle.en: Find answers to common questions about {brand}
faqPage.subtitle.zh: 查找有关 {brand} 的常见问题解答

faqPage.noResults.en: No FAQs found matching your search.
faqPage.noResults.zh: 未找到匹配的常见问题。

faqPage.sections.general.isFree.answer.en: Yes, PDFCraft is completely free to use. There are no hidden costs, no premium tiers, and no registration required. All features are available to everyone.
faqPage.sections.general.isFree.answer.zh: 是的，PDFCraft 完全免费使用。没有隐藏费用，没有高级会员，也无需注册。所有功能对每个人开放。

faqPage.sections.general.account.questio.en: Do I need to create an account?

faqPage.sections.general.account.answer.en: No, you don't need to create an account or register to use PDFCraft. Simply visit the website and start using any tool immediately.
faqPage.sections.general.account.answer.zh: 不需要，您无需创建账户或注册即可使用 PDFCraft。只需访问网站即可立即开始使用任何工具。

faqPage.sections.privacy.uploaded.questi.en: Are my files uploaded to a server?
faqPage.sections.privacy.uploaded.questi.zh: 我的文件会被上传到服务器吗？

faqPage.sections.privacy.uploaded.answer.en: No, your files are never uploaded to any server. All PDF processing happens locally in your browser using JavaScript and WebAssembly. Your files never leave your device.
faqPage.sections.privacy.uploaded.answer.zh: 不会，您的文件从未上传到任何服务器。所有 PDF 处理都使用 JavaScript 和 WebAssembly 在浏览器本地进行。您的文件从未离开您的设备。

faqPage.sections.privacy.safe.question.en: Is it safe to use PDFCraft with sensitive documents?
faqPage.sections.privacy.safe.question.zh: 使用 PDFCraft 处理敏感文档安全吗？

faqPage.sections.privacy.safe.answer.en: Yes, PDFCraft is designed with privacy in mind. Since all processing happens locally in your browser, your sensitive documents remain on your device and are never transmitted over the internet.
faqPage.sections.privacy.safe.answer.zh: 是的，PDFCraft 的设计以隐私为重。由于所有处理都在浏览器本地进行，您的敏感文档保留在您的设备上，从未通过互联网传输。

faqPage.sections.privacy.storage.questio.en: What happens to my files after processing?
faqPage.sections.privacy.storage.questio.zh: 处理后我的文件会怎样？

faqPage.sections.privacy.storage.answer.en: Your files are stored temporarily in your browser's memory during processing. Once you close the browser tab or navigate away, all file data is automatically cleared. We don't store any of your files.
faqPage.sections.privacy.storage.answer.zh: 您的文件在处理过程中暂时存储在浏览器的内存中。一旦您关闭浏览器标签页或离开页面，所有文件数据将自动清除。我们不会存储您的任何文件。

faqPage.sections.features.operations.que.en: What PDF operations can I perform?
faqPage.sections.features.operations.que.zh: 我可以执行哪些 PDF 操作？

faqPage.sections.features.operations.ans.en: PDFCraft offers 67+ tools including: merge, split, compress, convert (to/from images, text, JSON), edit, annotate, sign, add watermarks, encrypt/decrypt, OCR, and many more.
faqPage.sections.features.operations.ans.zh: PDFCraft 提供 67+ 个工具，包括：合并、分割、压缩、转换（转为/来自图像、文本、JSON）、编辑、注释、签名、添加水印、加密/解密、OCR 等等。

faqPage.sections.features.merge.question.en: Can I merge multiple PDF files?
faqPage.sections.features.merge.question.zh: 我可以合并多个 PDF 文件吗？

faqPage.sections.features.merge.answer.en: Yes, you can merge multiple PDF files into one. Simply use the Merge PDF tool, upload your files, arrange them in the desired order, and click merge.
faqPage.sections.features.merge.answer.zh: 是的，您可以将多个 PDF 文件合并为一个。只需使用合并 PDF 工具，上传您的文件，按所需顺序排列，然后点击合并。

faqPage.sections.features.images.questio.en: Can I convert images to PDF?
faqPage.sections.features.images.questio.zh: 我可以将图像转换为 PDF 吗？

faqPage.sections.features.images.answer.en: Yes, PDFCraft supports converting various image formats (JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, TIFF, SVG, HEIC) to PDF. You can convert single or multiple images at once.
faqPage.sections.features.images.answer.zh: 是的，PDFCraft 支持将各种图像格式（JPG、PNG、WebP、BMP、TIFF、SVG、HEIC）转换为 PDF。您可以一次转换单个或多个图像。

faqPage.sections.features.edit.question.en: Can I edit text in a PDF?
faqPage.sections.features.edit.question.zh: 我可以编辑 PDF 中的文本吗？

faqPage.sections.features.edit.answer.en: PDFCraft provides annotation and editing tools including highlighting, adding text, shapes, images, and signatures. For full text editing, the PDF Editor tool offers comprehensive annotation capabilities.
faqPage.sections.features.edit.answer.zh: PDFCraft 提供注释和编辑工具，包括高亮、添加文本、形状、图像和签名。如需全文编辑，PDF 编辑器工具提供全面的注释功能。

faqPage.sections.technical.browsers.answ.en: PDFCraft works on all modern browsers including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. We recommend using the latest version of your browser for the best experience.
faqPage.sections.technical.browsers.answ.zh: PDFCraft 适用于所有现代浏览器，包括 Chrome、Firefox、Safari 和 Edge。我们建议使用最新版本的浏览器以获得最佳体验。

faqPage.sections.technical.sizeLimit.que.en: Is there a file size limit?

faqPage.sections.technical.sizeLimit.ans.en: Most tools support files up to 100MB, with some tools like merge and compress supporting up to 500MB. These limits are in place to ensure smooth performance in your browser.
faqPage.sections.technical.sizeLimit.ans.zh: 大多数工具支持最大 100MB 的文件，合并和压缩等工具支持最大 500MB。这些限制是为了确保浏览器中的流畅性能。

faqPage.sections.technical.slow.question.en: Why is processing slow for large files?
faqPage.sections.technical.slow.question.zh: 为什么大文件处理速度慢？

faqPage.sections.technical.slow.answer.en: Since all processing happens in your browser, performance depends on your device's capabilities. Large files require more memory and processing power. For best results, close other browser tabs and applications.
faqPage.sections.technical.slow.answer.zh: 由于所有处理都在浏览器中进行，性能取决于您设备的能力。大文件需要更多的内存和处理能力。为了获得最佳结果，请关闭其他浏览器标签页和应用程序。

faqPage.sections.technical.offline.answe.en: Currently, PDFCraft requires an internet connection to load the application. However, once loaded, the PDF processing itself happens locally and doesn't require a connection.
faqPage.sections.technical.offline.answe.zh: 目前，PDFCraft 需要互联网连接才能加载应用程序。但是，一旦加载，PDF 处理本身在本地进行，不需要连接。

faqPage.sections.languages.supported.ans.en: PDFCraft is available in 9 languages: English, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, French, German, Chinese, Portuguese, and Arabic (with RTL support).
faqPage.sections.languages.supported.ans.zh: PDFCraft 提供 9 种语言版本：英语、日语、韩语、西班牙语、法语、德语、中文、葡萄牙语和阿拉伯语（支持从右到左）。

faqPage.sections.languages.change.questi.en: How do I change the language?

faqPage.sections.languages.change.answer.en: You can change the language using the language selector in the header. Your preference will be saved for future visits.
faqPage.sections.languages.change.answer.zh: 您可以使用顶部的语言选择器更改语言。您的偏好将被保存以供将来访问。

faqPage.cta.description.en: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Feel free to reach out to us.
faqPage.cta.description.zh: 找不到您想要的答案？请随时联系我们。

aboutPage.description.en: {brand} is a free, privacy-focused PDF toolkit that runs entirely in your browser. With {count}+ professional tools, you can edit, convert, merge, split, and secure your PDF files without ever uploading them to a server.
aboutPage.description.zh: {brand} 是一个免费、注重隐私的 PDF 工具包，完全在您的浏览器中运行。拥有 {count}+ 个专业工具，您可以编辑、转换、合并、分割和保护您的 PDF 文件，而无需将其上传到任何服务器。

aboutPage.mission.p1.en: We believe that everyone should have access to powerful PDF tools without compromising their privacy or paying expensive subscription fees. That's why we created {brand} – a comprehensive PDF toolkit that puts your privacy first.
aboutPage.mission.p1.zh: 我们相信，每个人都应该能够使用强大的 PDF 工具，而无需牺牲隐私或支付昂贵的订阅费用。这就是为什么我们创建了 {brand} —— 一个将您的隐私放在首位的综合 PDF 工具包。

aboutPage.mission.p2.en: Unlike traditional PDF services that require you to upload your files to remote servers, {brand} processes everything locally in your browser. Your sensitive documents never leave your device, giving you complete control over your data.
aboutPage.mission.p2.zh: 与要求您将文件上传到远程服务器的传统 PDF 服务不同，{brand} 在您的浏览器中本地处理所有内容。您的敏感文档从未离开您的设备，让您完全控制您的数据。

aboutPage.mission.p3.en: Whether you're a student, professional, or casual user, {brand} provides all the tools you need to work with PDFs efficiently and securely.
aboutPage.mission.p3.zh: 无论您是学生、专业人士还是普通用户，{brand} 都为您提供高效、安全地处理 PDF 所需的所有工具。

aboutPage.values.privacy.description.en: Your files never leave your device. All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring complete privacy and security.
aboutPage.values.privacy.description.zh: 您的文件从未离开您的设备。所有处理都在浏览器本地进行，确保完全的隐私和安全。

aboutPage.values.fast.description.en: Powered by modern web technologies, PDFCraft delivers lightning-fast PDF processing without the need for uploads or downloads.
aboutPage.values.fast.description.zh: 由现代 Web 技术驱动，PDFCraft 提供闪电般的 PDF 处理速度，无需上传或下载。

aboutPage.values.accessible.description.en: Available in 9 languages and works on any device with a modern browser. No installation required.
aboutPage.values.accessible.description.zh: 提供 9 种语言版本，可在任何带有现代浏览器的设备上工作。无需安装。

aboutPage.values.free.description.en: PDFCraft is completely free to use with no hidden costs, no registration required, and no limits on usage.
aboutPage.values.free.description.zh: PDFCraft 完全免费使用，没有隐藏费用，无需注册，也不限制使用次数。

aboutPage.values.openSource.description.en: Built with transparency in mind. Our code is open source, allowing anyone to verify our privacy claims.
aboutPage.values.openSource.description.zh: 以透明为核心构建。我们的代码是开源的，允许任何人验证我们的隐私承诺。

aboutPage.values.community.description.en: Developed with feedback from users around the world. We continuously improve based on your needs.
aboutPage.values.community.description.zh: 根据全球用户的反馈开发。我们会根据您的需求不断改进。

aboutPage.technology.description.en: {brand} is built using cutting-edge web technologies to ensure the best possible experience:
aboutPage.technology.description.zh: {brand} 采用尖端 Web 技术构建，以确保最佳体验：

aboutPage.technology.list.nextjs.zh: <strong1>Next.js</strong1> - 用于快速、SEO友好的页面渲染

aboutPage.technology.list.wasm.zh: <strong1>WebAssembly</strong1> - 提供近乎原生的 PDF 处理性能

aboutPage.technology.list.workers.zh: <strong1>Web Workers</strong1> - 用于非阻塞后台处理

aboutPage.technology.list.pdflib.zh: <strong1>pdf-lib & PDF.js</strong1> - 业界标准的 PDF 操作库

aboutPage.technology.list.indexeddb.en: <strong1>IndexedDB</strong1> - For secure local storage of your work
aboutPage.technology.list.indexeddb.zh: <strong1>IndexedDB</strong1> - 用于安全地本地存储您的工作

aboutPage.technology.summary.en: This combination of technologies allows us to provide professional-grade PDF tools that run entirely in your browser, without any server-side processing.
aboutPage.technology.summary.zh: 这种技术组合使我们能够提供专业级的 PDF 工具，完全在您的浏览器中运行，无需任何服务器端处理。

aboutPage.cta.description.en: Explore our {count}+ PDF tools and see what {brand} can do for you.
aboutPage.cta.description.zh: 探索我们的 {count}+ 个 PDF 工具，看看 {brand} 能为您做什么。

common.globalInvoiceParser.uploadDescrip.en: Analyzes invoice amount and auto-calculates exchange rate locally, rendering a premium localized exchange-rate ledger card.
common.globalInvoiceParser.uploadDescrip.zh: 智能识别发票金额并在本地自动换算汇率，为您盖印一张精美的本地化汇率折算记账卡片。

common.globalInvoiceParser.successMessag.en: Exchange rate ledger stamped on foreign invoice successfully!
common.globalInvoiceParser.successMessag.zh: 汇率折算记账印章成功盖印在外币发票上！

common.globalInvoiceParser.convertRateAp.en: Converted original total {original} {currency} locally via exchange rate {rate}.
common.globalInvoiceParser.convertRateAp.zh: 已根据汇率 {rate} 在本地将原始总额 {original} {currency} 换算为目标货币。

common.globalInvoiceParser.emptyStateDes.en: Extract currency info from the invoice in one click and render a premium localized exchange-rate card styled with glassmorphism locally.
common.globalInvoiceParser.emptyStateDes.zh: 一键自动提取发票中的币种与金额，在本地渲染一张精美的微光玻璃态汇率记账卡片。

common.globalInvoiceParser.customRatePla.en: e.g. 7.25 (Leave blank to use real-time rate)
common.globalInvoiceParser.customRatePla.zh: 例如 7.25 (留空则默认使用实时汇率)

tools.pdfMultiTool.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop PDF files here, or click to browse. You can upload multiple files.
tools.pdfMultiTool.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处，或点击浏览。可以上传多个文件。

tools.pdfMultiTool.organizeHint.en: Drag and drop pages to reorder them.

tools.pdfMultiTool.deleteHint.en: Click pages to mark them for deletion.

tools.pdfMultiTool.rotateHint.en: Click rotation buttons on pages, or rotate all:
tools.pdfMultiTool.rotateHint.zh: 点击页面上的旋转按钮，或旋转全部：

tools.pdfMultiTool.duplicateHint.en: Click the duplicate button on pages to copy them.
tools.pdfMultiTool.duplicateHint.zh: 点击页面上的复制按钮以复制页面。

tools.pdfMultiTool.successMessage.en: PDF processed successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.pdfMultiTool.successMessage.zh: PDF处理成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.imageToPdf.batchModeHint.en: Will create {pdfCount} PDF file(s), packaged as a ZIP archive.
tools.imageToPdf.batchModeHint.zh: 将创建 {pdfCount} 个PDF文件，打包为ZIP压缩包。

tools.imageToPdf.batchSuccessMessage.en: Successfully created {pdfCount} PDF files from {imageCount} images! Click the download button to save your ZIP archive.
tools.imageToPdf.batchSuccessMessage.zh: 已成功从 {imageCount} 张图片创建 {pdfCount} 个PDF文件！点击下载按钮保存ZIP压缩包。

tools.compressPdf.algorithmStandardDesc.zh: 通用压缩。平衡文件大小和质量。

tools.compressPdf.algorithmCondenseDesc.zh: 强力压缩。可能会显著降低图像质量。

tools.compressPdf.algorithmPhotonDesc.en: Rasterizes pages — best for image-heavy PDFs
tools.compressPdf.algorithmPhotonDesc.zh: 将页面转换为高质量图像。最适合减小超大文件。
